summary: Commerce MCP Studio 0.2.11: in-panel .env.mcp region setup and nested environment selection.
highlights: + .env.mcp creates auth/API URLs with Australia GCP as the default
Pick cloud and region directly in the Connections panel
Environment suffix (STG, DEV, …) is a sub-selection under your .env credentials

changed: Replaced per-environment supplement files with a single .env.mcp for commercetools URLs
Cloud and region selectors update .env.mcp without leaving the studio panel
Default commercetools API region is now Australia GCP when URLs are not configured
